expectations.evidence: Has '## Task Overview' with a proper markdown table listing all 5 tasks with columns for #, Task, Depends on, Parallel
All 5 tasks have '### Context' sections with multiple paragraphs of background — e.g., Task 1 explains both core entities, encryption decisions, retry strategy
All 5 tasks have '### Acceptance Criteria' with checkbox items — e.g., Task 1 has 5 criteria, Task 2 has 9
All 5 tasks have '### Dependencies' with both 'Blocked by:' and 'Blocks:' lines
Tasks reference the spec file in '### References' as supplementary pointers but all context is fully inline — no 'see the spec for details' anywhere
Covers data model (T1), registry API (T2), delivery pipeline (T3), HMAC signing (T4), management UI (T5)
Has Goal line, Task Overview table, then numbered '## Task N: Name' sections with Context/Requirements/Acceptance Criteria/Dependencies/References subsections
